name: cling
title: Cling File Search
description: Instant fuzzy search over the whole filesystem using the Cling app
author: alin

commands.name: fuzzy-search-files
commands.title: Fuzzy Search Files
commands.description: Searches the entire filesystem using fuzzy queries. Additional search operators: .png .jpg to filter by extension, in:~/Desktop to search in a folder.

commands.name: reindex-files
commands.title: Reindex Files
commands.description: Triggers a full reindexing of the filesystem

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal Application
preferences.description: The terminal app to use for "Open in Terminal". Falls back to the Cling app setting, then Terminal.app.

preferences.name: editorApp
preferences.title: Editor Application
preferences.description: The editor app to use for "Open in Editor". Falls back to the Cling app setting, then Visual Studio Code.

preferences.name: shelfApp
preferences.title: Shelf Application
preferences.description: The shelf app to use for "Shelve File" (e.g. Yoink, Dropover, Dockside). Falls back to the Cling app setting, then auto-detects installed shelf apps.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
